Site.Name: Barstow
Site.Description: 32357 Ivy Ave, Barstow, CA 92311; In the backyard of what used to be CI.Q0056

Channel.Description: New site install

Comment.subject: Install a configured logger and its instruments

Channel.Description: The linear filter rates and SIS data stream template were updated on 7/31

Comment.subject: Change Data Stream configuration only (e.g. to rename channels)
